author: DisneyMusicVEVO YouTube
text:
Cast of Camp Rock - One Beat Away (From "Camp Rock 3"/Lyric Video)
“Camp Rock 3” is available on Disney Channel and Disney+ this summer.
https://www.disneyplus.com/whats-on 

When their opening act cancels last minute, Connect 3 hosts a competition at Camp Rock to find fresh new talent to perform on their national tour. Newcomer Sage is fiercely determined to win and won’t let her gifted slacker brother, Desi, get in the way. The competition heats up with Fletch, a dreamy bad-boy guitarist, cello prodigy Rosie, and Cliff, an energetic drummer. When unexpected friendships emerge, the stakes get complicated, and our campers must decide if there’s more to life than the spotlight.

🌟 Every Magical Moment, Every Iconic Song: https://www.youtube.com/@DisneyMusicVEVO?sub_confirmation=1

All Your Favorite Disney Hits, All Together: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLiNVoBckLqLmdcbotc6n_MjdTDCHLiYDo
